ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(StageName) && NOT(Current_Stage_Sign_Off_Complete__c) && ( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Discovery") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Requirement Gathering") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Requirement Documentation") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "User Story Finalization") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete and approve the sign-off document for the current stage before advancing.
